canonical_question: How do I fix common Rust borrow checker errors?
aliases: Rust borrow checker errors and fixes
How to resolve Rust ownership and borrowing errors
Rust E0382 E0502 E0505 E0597 fix guide

temporal_validity.last_breaking_change: Rust 1.63 (2022-08-11) — NLL enabled by default on all editions

constraints: At any given time, you can have EITHER one mutable reference OR any number of immutable references to the same data — never both
References must always be valid — no dangling references allowed (enforced at compile time)
Values cannot be used after ownership is moved (transferred) to another binding
Mutable references require exclusive access — no other references (mutable or immutable) can coexist

skip_this_unit_if.condition: Error is a lifetime annotation issue on function signatures or struct definitions (E0106, E0621)
Error involves async/await and Pin<Box<dyn Future>> (E0277 with Future trait bounds)
Error is about trait object safety or dyn dispatch (E0038)
skip_this_unit_if.use_instead: Rust trait objects and dispatch guide

inputs_needed.question: What is the exact Rust compiler error code (e.g., E0382, E0502)?
